channel.title: AISight — AI Capital Expenditure Tracker
channel.description: Latest news and data on AI infrastructure spending across 38 companies. Updated 3x daily from SEC filings and earnings calls.

item.title: Samsung Electronics Q1 2026 Record Profit $38B: AI Chips Drive Best-Ever Results, Path to Dominance
item.description: SEOUL, South Korea — Samsung Electronics Co. on Tuesday reported the strongest quarterly results in South Korean corporate history, posting a preliminary operating profit of 57.2 trillion won ($37.9 billion) for the first quarter of 2026 — an eye-popping 755%… [Samsung]

item.title: Silicon Data brings transparency to future GPU prices for enterprise CFOs
item.description: Silicon Data, a startup that provides market intelligence for artificial intelligence compute infrastructure, is bringing much-needed transparency to the cost of renting enormous clusters of graphics processing units. The company today announced a new service… [Intel]

item.title: The vibes are off at OpenAI
item.description: OpenAI is in a relatively precarious position. The company is and has been a funding behemoth - just over a week ago, it closed $122 billion in funding at a post-money valuation of $852 billion. It's potentially planning for an IPO later this year. ChatGPT's … [OpenAI]
